extract: This article is about the move introduced in Generation V. For the Ability whose Japanese name translates as "Acrobatics", see Unburden (Ability). Acrobatics (Japanese: アクロバット Acrobat) is a damage-dealing Flying-type move introduced in Generation V. It is: TM62 from Generations V through Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. TM78 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM014 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet.
